# CardWiz

> CardWiz is an India-first tool that helps people choose the credit or debit card that gives the most rewards and cashback at checkout. Compare 195+ Indian credit & debit cards, understand bank offers, and never overpay. Available as a free Chrome extension and a website.

CardWiz covers Indian cards across HDFC, SBI, ICICI, Axis, American Express, Kotak, IDFC FIRST, RBL and more — with reward rates broken down by spend category (fuel, dining, travel, online shopping, groceries, utilities). All amounts are in Indian Rupees (₹) and reflect Indian bank programs and RBI rules.

## Key pages
- [All cards](https://cardwiz.in/cards): Browse and compare 195+ Indian credit and debit cards.
- [Find my card](https://cardwiz.in/find-my-card): A short quiz that recommends the best card for your spending.
- [AI card assistant](https://cardwiz.in/ai): Ask which card is best for any purchase or category.
- [Card comparisons](https://cardwiz.in/compare): Head-to-head comparisons between two cards.
- [Best card by category](https://cardwiz.in/best-card-for/fuel): Best cards for fuel, dining, travel, online shopping, groceries and more.
- [Bank offers](https://cardwiz.in/offers): Current credit and debit card offers, by bank.
- [News](https://cardwiz.in/news): Latest Indian credit-card news and RBI updates, in English, Hinglish and Hindi.
- [Pricing](https://cardwiz.in/pricing): Free, Premium and Pro plans.

## Notes
- Scope is India-only: Indian cards, Indian bank offers, ₹ amounts, RBI regulations.
- Content is available in three languages: English, Hinglish (Romanised Hindi) and Hindi.
- Privacy-first: CardWiz never stores full card numbers, PAN or CVV.
